prompt: The guilty liver character fidgets nervously on the interrogation chair, sweating, its eyes darting and little hands raising in a guilty shrug, the faucet dripping beside it. Camera: slow push-in toward the nervous liver. negative_prompt: realistic organ, gore, deformed, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning

The liver's worried eyes well up and a sweat drop rolls down as it looks at the viewer with a guilty, sorrowful expression. Camera: slow push-in to its face. negative_prompt: realistic organ, gore, deformed, extra limbs, creepy, text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning

The liver presses a little hand to its chest and lowers its eyes in a heavy confession, then looks up at the viewer. Camera: slow push-in toward the liver. negative_prompt: realistic organ, gore, deformed, extra limbs, creepy, text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning

The liver gestures down at the three EVIDENCE cards on the floor, shrugging as if none of them stop it. Camera: slow push-in past the cards to the liver. negative_prompt: realistic organ, gore, deformed, extra limbs, creepy, distorted text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning

The gears and pistons inside the liver's open belly turn relentlessly, pumping out little white sugar cubes that pile up below. Camera: slow push-in toward the churning gears. negative_prompt: realistic organ, gore, deformed, extra limbs, creepy, text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning

The broken INSULIN gauge sparks and flashes red while the faucet keeps leaking sugar; the liver shrugs helplessly. Camera: slow pan from the broken gauge to the liver. negative_prompt: realistic organ, gore, deformed, extra limbs, creepy, distorted text, watermark, logo, blurry, camera spinning
